name: Water and Power Community Credit Union
description_short: Water and Power Community Credit Union is a payday alternative lending provider based in Los Angeles, California. Rated 3.6/5 with 73 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
Water and Power Community Credit Union is a payday alternative lending provider serving clients in Los Angeles, California. Carrying a 3.6/5.0 Google rating from 73 reviews, Water and Power Community Credit Union has an solid reputation among consumers in the Los Angeles area looking to find affordable alternatives to traditional payday loans.

Operating as a atm, Water and Power Community Credit Union provides a range of services for consumers seeking payday alternative lending solutions. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

Payday alternative providers in Los Angeles offer consumers a way to access short-term funds without the high costs typically associated with traditional payday loans. Water and Power Community Credit Union operates in a space where regulation varies by state, and consumers should verify that any lender they work with is properly licensed. Key factors to compare include interest rates, loan limits, repayment terms, and whether the provider reports to credit bureaus.

Consumers in the Los Angeles, California area who are considering Water and Power Community Credit Union should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any payday alternative lending provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
